name: Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc (Arcadia Phu Quoc Resort)
address: Khu phố 7, Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Dương Đông, Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam
description:
Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc: Một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời ở Đảo Phú Quốc

Nằm tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc là một khách sạn 3.0 sao đáng chú ý. Với 51 phòng, khách sạn này mang đến không gian thoải mái và dịch vụ chất lượng cho du khách. Với năm khách sạn được xây dựng vào năm 2011 và sự cải tạo vào năm 2016, Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc mang đến một trải nghiệm hiện đại và đáng nhớ.

Với vị trí thuận lợi, Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc chỉ cách sân bay 20 phút đi xe và cách trung tâm thành phố 2 km. Điều này giúp du khách dễ dàng tiếp cận các điểm tham quan và hoạt động giải trí tại Đảo Phú Quốc.

Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc cũng có chính sách thuận lợi cho trẻ em. Trẻ em từ 0 đến 5 tuổi được ở miễn phí tại khách sạn này. Điều này giúp gia đình có thể tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời mà không phải lo lắng về chi phí phụ thuộc vào số lượng trẻ em.

Với thời gian nhận phòng từ 02:00 PM và trả phòng đến 12:00 PM, Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc đảm bảo sự linh hoạt cho du khách trong việc sắp xếp lịch trình của mình. Với không gian thoải mái và dịch vụ chất lượng, khách sạn này sẽ mang đến cho du khách một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại Đảo Phú Quốc.

Tiện nghi giải trí tại Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc

Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc không chỉ là một điểm đến lý tưởng để thư giãn và nghỉ ngơi, mà còn cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi giải trí đa dạng cho du khách. Khách sạn có một quầy bar tuyệt vời, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức các loại đồ uống tuyệt ngon trong không gian ấm cúng và thoải mái. Ngoài ra, Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc còn có dịch vụ massage chuyên nghiệp, sauna và spa để bạn có thể thư giãn và tái tạo năng lượng sau những ngày tham quan và khám phá. Bạn cũng có thể thả mình trong khu vườn xanh mát của resort, tận hưởng không gian tự nhiên tuyệt đẹp và tạo ra những kỷ niệm đáng nhớ.

Cơ sở vật chất thể thao tại Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc

Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai yêu thích hoạt động thể thao và giải trí. Tại đây, du khách có thể thỏa sức tham gia vào các hoạt động thể thao trên nước như lướt ván, chèo thuyền và cưỡi sóng. Với bãi biển riêng tư và một dải cát trắng mịn, du khách cũng có thể thỏa sức tắm biển, tắm nắng và tham gia câu cá để tận hưởng không gian tự nhiên tuyệt đẹp của đảo Phú Quốc.

Ngoài ra, Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc còn cung cấp nhiều hoạt động khác như lặn biển, đi bộ đường dài và snorkeling. Du khách có thể khám phá vẻ đẹp đáy biển và các sinh vật biển phong phú thông qua các chuyến lặn biển chuyên nghiệp. Còn nếu bạn muốn khám phá đảo Phú Quốc bằng cách đi bộ, khu vực này cũng có nhiều đường dẫn dẫn đến các địa điểm thú vị và hấp dẫn. Với những hoạt động thể thao đa dạng như vậy, Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc sẽ mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm thú vị và không thể quên.

Tiện nghi tiện lợi tại Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc

Nằm tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc mang đến cho khách hàng những tiện nghi tiện lợi để tận hưởng một kỳ nghỉ thú vị. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ giặt ủi, dịch vụ phòng và lễ tân 24 giờ để đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của khách. Wi-Fi miễn phí ở các khu vực công cộng và khu vực cấm hút thuốc đã được đặt riêng để mang lại sự thoải mái tối đa cho khách hàng. Bên cạnh đó, Wi-Fi miễn phí cũng được cung cấp trong tất cả các phòng. Resort còn có dịch vụ giữ hành lý và dọn phòng hàng ngày để đảm bảo sự tiện nghi và sạch sẽ cho khách hàng.

Tiện ích vận chuyển tại Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc

Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc cung cấp nhiều tiện ích vận chuyển để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Khi đến đây bằng xe hơi, bạn sẽ không phải lo lắng về việc tìm chỗ đậu xe vì khu nghỉ có bãi đỗ xe rộng rãi và miễn phí. Điều này giúp bạn tiết kiệm thời gian và tiền bạc. Nếu bạn muốn khám phá các địa điểm thú vị trên đảo, Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc cũng cung cấp dịch vụ vé để bạn có thể mua vé một cách thuận tiện và nhanh chóng.

Tiện nghi phòng tại Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc

Tận hưởng sự thoải mái và tiện nghi tuyệt vời tại Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc. Các phòng được trang bị máy lạnh để đảm bảo không gian lý tưởng cho khách hàng. Bên cạnh đó, khách sạn còn cung cấp áo choàng tắm và máy sấy tóc tiện dụng để bạn có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ của mình. 

Để đáp ứng nhu cầu giải trí của bạn, mỗi phòng còn có truyền hình và tivi với nhiều kênh đa dạng. Bạn cũng có thể thưởng thức đồ uống mát lạnh từ minibar trong phòng. Hơn nữa, mỗi phòng đều có ban công hoặc sân hiên riêng, nơi bạn có thể thư giãn và ngắm nhìn khung cảnh xung quanh. Cuối cùng, phòng còn được trang bị tivi vệ tinh và tủ lạnh để đảm bảo sự tiện nghi và thoải mái cho du khách.

Tiện nghi ẩm thực tại Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc

Tận hưởng những trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời tại Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc. Khách sạn có một quầy cà phê đẹp mắt, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức những tách cà phê thơm ngon và thư giãn trong không gian thoáng đãng. Ngoài ra, Resort cũng cung cấp dịch vụ phòng ăn tại chỗ, giúp bạn tận hưởng các món ăn ngon tại sự riêng tư của phòng nghỉ. Bạn chỉ cần gọi điện thoại và đặt món, và đội ngũ phục vụ sẽ nhanh chóng mang đến cho bạn những món ăn ngon và phục vụ tận tâm. Không chỉ vậy, Resort còn có dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày, đảm bảo không gian sống của bạn luôn sạch sẽ và thoải mái.

Các loại phòng tại Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc

Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam cung cấp một loạt các loại phòng để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Các loại phòng bao gồm Bungalow Chủ Tịch với diện tích 35 mét vuông và 1 giường King, Phòng Premier Mặt Biển với diện tích 45 mét vuông và 1 giường King hoặc 2 giường Đơn, và Phòng Superior Nhìn Vườn với diện tích 20 mét vuông và 1 giường King. 

Đặt phòng tại Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc thông qua Agoda mang lại nhiều lợi ích cho khách hàng. Agoda cam kết cung cấp giá tốt nhất cho các loại phòng này, giúp khách hàng tiết kiệm chi phí đáng kể. Ngoài ra, việc đặt phòng thông qua Agoda cũng mang lại trải nghiệm đơn giản và tiện lợi, giúp khách hàng tiết kiệm thời gian và công sức trong quá trình đặt phòng.

Khám phá Dương Đông - Trung tâm sầm uất của Đảo Phú Quốc

Dương Đông là một thành phố nhỏ nằm ở trung tâm của Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam. Với vị trí đắc địa, thành phố này là điểm đến hấp dẫn cho du khách muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp hoang sơ của đảo. Dương Đông nổi tiếng với bãi biển tuyệt đẹp, nước biển trong xanh và cát trắng mịn, thu hút du khách đến đây để tắm biển và thư giãn.

Ngoài bãi biển, Dương Đông còn có một số điểm tham quan đáng chú ý. Du khách có thể tham quan chợ đêm Dương Đông để trải nghiệm không khí sôi động và mua sắm các sản phẩm đặc sản của đảo. Thành phố cũng có nhiều nhà hàng, quán cà phê và quán bar, nơi du khách có thể thưởng thức các món ăn đa dạng và thưởng thức đồ uống ngon. Dương Đông cũng là điểm khởi hành cho các tour du lịch khám phá các điểm đến khác trên đảo, như Suối Tranh, Cửa Cạn, và Cầu Dinh Cậu.

Hướng dẫn di chuyển từ sân bay đến Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc

Đảo Phú Quốc, nằm ngoài khơi phía Tây Nam của Việt Nam, được biết đến với những bãi biển tuyệt đẹp và khung cảnh thiên nhiên hùng vĩ. Nếu bạn đang tìm kiếm một kỳ nghỉ thú vị tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời. Để đến Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc từ sân bay gần nhất, bạn có một số phương án di chuyển.

Phương án đầu tiên là sử dụng taxi hoặc dịch vụ xe đưa đón từ sân bay. Đây là phương án tiện lợi và nhanh chóng nhất, đặc biệt nếu bạn có nhiều hành lý hoặc đi cùng gia đình. Các dịch vụ taxi và xe đưa đón sẽ đưa bạn trực tiếp từ sân bay đến Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc, tiết kiệm thời gian và công sức di chuyển.

Phương án thứ hai là sử dụng dịch vụ xe buýt công cộng. Đảo Phú Quốc có một hệ thống xe buýt phục vụ du khách và người dân địa phương. Bạn có thể lựa chọn xe buýt từ sân bay đến trung tâm thành phố Dương Đông, sau đó đi bộ hoặc sử dụng taxi để đến Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc. Mặc dù phương án này có thể mất thời gian hơn, nhưng nó là một cách tiết kiệm và thú vị để khám phá Đảo Phú Quốc.

Khám phá các điểm đến nổi tiếng gần Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc

Tọa lạc tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc nằm gần một số điểm đến nổi tiếng, mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm thú vị và đa dạng.

Long Beach là một trong những bãi biển đẹp nhất tại Đảo Phú Quốc. Với bờ cát trắng mịn và nước biển trong xanh, du khách có thể thư giãn, tắm nắng và tham gia các hoạt động thể thao nước tại đây.

Ngoài ra, Dinh Cậu cũng là một điểm đến hấp dẫn. Đây là một ngọn hải đăng nằm trên một hòn đảo nhỏ, tạo nên một khung cảnh lãng mạn và độc đáo. Du khách có thể tận hưởng cảnh quan biển xanh thẳm và chiêm ngưỡng mặt trời lặn tuyệt đẹp từ đây.

Bên cạnh đó, Bảo tàng Cội Nguồn là một điểm đến lý tưởng để tìm hiểu về lịch sử và văn hóa của Đảo Phú Quốc. Du khách có thể khám phá các triển lãm độc đáo và những hiện vật quý giá trưng bày tại đây.

Với vị trí thuận lợi gần các điểm đến nổi tiếng như Long Beach, Dinh Cậu và Bảo tàng Cội Nguồn, Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách mong muốn khám phá Đảo Phú Quốc.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc

Nằm tại vị trí đắc địa, Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc mang đến cho khách hàng một lựa chọn đa dạng về những nhà hàng xung quanh. Bạn có thể thưởng thức các món hải sản tươi ngon tại Xin Chao seafood restaurant và Ra Khoi Restaurant. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức ẩm thực Ấn Độ, hãy ghé thăm Maharaja Lounge - Authentic Indian 100% Veg Restaurant và Ganesh Indian Restaurant Phu Quoc. Nếu bạn thích hương vị phương Tây, Winston's Burgers & Beer và The Home Pizza Tran Hung Dao là những lựa chọn tuyệt vời. Đừng quên ghé qua OCSEN Beach Bar & Club, Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant để thưởng thức cocktail và ngắm hoàng hôn tuyệt đẹp. Cuối cùng, nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức ẩm thực Việt Nam địa phương, hãy ghé qua Saigonese Eatery và Hanh Nhung Luxury.

Khám phá những điểm mua sắm xung quanh Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc

Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc nằm gần nhiều điểm mua sắm nổi tiếng, mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm mua sắm thú vị. Ngọc trai Long Beach là một trong những điểm đến hấp dẫn, nơi bạn có thể tìm thấy những món đồ thủ công tinh xảo từ ngọc trai. Nếu bạn quan tâm đến nghệ thuật địa phương, Cửa hàng đồ mỹ nghệ Phú Quốc là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời để khám phá các sản phẩm độc đáo và sáng tạo của người dân địa phương. Đừng quên ghé thăm Chợ Dương Đông và Chợ đêm Phú Quốc, hai chợ nổi tiếng với đa dạng sản phẩm từ thực phẩm đến quần áo và đồ lưu niệm. Với vị trí thuận lợi của mình, Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc là điểm dừng chân lí tưởng cho những ai muốn khám phá thế giới mua sắm đặc trưng của Đảo Phú Quốc.

Giá phòng trung bình tại Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc so với Đảo Phú Quốc

Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tại Đảo Phú Quốc mà không cần phải chi trả quá nhiều. Với giá phòng trung bình chỉ $27, Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm đáng giá với tiện nghi và dịch vụ chất lượng cao. So với giá phòng trung bình tại Đảo Phú Quốc là $75, Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc đáng chú ý với mức giá hợp lý và cạnh tranh. Du khách có thể tiết kiệm một khoản lớn khi lựa chọn nghỉ tại đây mà vẫn được tận hưởng những dịch vụ và tiện ích tốt nhất.

Dịch vụ và đội ngũ nhân viên thân thiện và hỗ trợ tuyệt vời

Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc nhận được những đánh giá tích cực về dịch vụ và đội ngũ nhân viên thân thiện và hỗ trợ. Khách hàng đã ca ngợi về sự thân thiện và nhiệt tình của nhân viên, đồng thời nhận xét rằng họ luôn cố gắng trò chuyện với khách về ngày làm việc của họ. Sự thân thiện và hỗ trợ của đội ngũ nhân viên đã tạo nên một không gian thư giãn và sạch sẽ. Ngoài ra, khách hàng cũng đánh giá cao bãi biển riêng tư tại resort và cho biết rằng phòng ngủ luôn được giữ gìn sạch sẽ.

Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc: Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời với đánh giá cao từ khách hàng

Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc, tọa lạc tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, đã nhận được đánh giá cao từ khách hàng với tổng điểm 7.3 trên 10. Khách hàng đánh giá đặc biệt cao về giá trị của kỳ nghỉ tại đây với điểm 7.3, cho thấy độ hài lòng về giá cả phù hợp với chất lượng dịch vụ mà resort mang lại.

Khách hàng cũng đánh giá cao về vị trí đắc địa của Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc với điểm 8.1. Nằm tại một vị trí thuận lợi, resort chỉ cách các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng như Bãi Dài, Dinh Cậu và Chợ Đêm Dương Đông trong khoảng cách ngắn. Điều này giúp khách hàng dễ dàng khám phá vẻ đẹp của Đảo Phú Quốc mà không mất nhiều thời gian di chuyển.

Không chỉ vậy, Resort Arcadia Phú Quốc còn nhận được đánh giá cao về sự thoải mái của phòng nghỉ với điểm 7.6. Khách hàng đã trải nghiệm những căn phòng rộng rãi, thoáng mát và được trang bị đầy đủ tiện nghi hiện đại. Điều này giúp khách hàng có một kỳ nghỉ thư giãn và thoải mái tại đây.

sample_comments.text: Đến Phú Quốc mà không đi tham quan, một mình nằm trong căn phòng nhìn ra biển suốt ba ngày, cách sân bay không xa, chỉ mất mười mấy phút đi taxi là đến nơi, ban ngày không ra ngoài, ở trong phòng xem biển, chiều tối thì ra bãi biển ngay cửa để chụp hoàng hôn, mỗi ngày đều có hoàng hôn màu tím, tối thì đi siêu thị VinMart mua rượu về uống và ngắm biển, còn có mèo bầu bạn, cảm giác này thật dễ chịu.

sample_comments.text: Đã đặt hai ngày phòng hai giường. Trước tiên, vị trí rất tốt, đi đến siêu thị Kim Cương và chợ đêm Phú Quốc rất thuận tiện, chỉ có đoạn đường vào khách sạn hơi tối, các cô gái có thể sợ bóng tối, nhưng không sao, rất an toàn! Nói về khách sạn, khách sạn này khá cũ, vừa mở cửa đã có mùi ẩm mốc rất nặng, vệ sinh cũng chỉ ở mức bình thường, trên chăn có một số vết dầu, những người có tính sạch sẽ có lẽ sẽ không chấp nhận được, tôi có một chút yêu ghét với khách sạn này, bên ngoài là một cảnh biển tuyệt đẹp, gió biển nhẹ nhàng, chỉ có tiếng gió thổi và sóng vỗ, khiến người ta cảm thấy thoải mái, tổng thể khách sạn bình thường nhưng giá cả hợp lý và phong cảnh đẹp.

sample_comments.negatives: Trang thiết bị và tiện nghi của phòng đều quá cũ . Resort nên cải tạo lại sớm

sample_comments.text: Chúng tôi rất thích kỳ nghỉ 10 đêm của mình. Bữa sáng thật tuyệt. Phòng của chúng tôi rộng rãi và chỉ một vài bước là đến bãi biển. Chúng tôi đã bơi hàng ngày. Có nhiều nhà hàng tuyệt vời trong khoảng cách đi bộ. Nhân viên trong nhà hàng và dọn phòng rất thân thiện và hữu ích! Chúng tôi yêu kỳ nghỉ của mình.

sample_comments.title: Very disappointing experience.
sample_comments.text:
The staff behavior was extremely rude and unprofessional throughout our stay. There was no proper room cleaning service provided. The room did not even have a phone to contact the reception, and whenever we tried to reach the reception in person, no staff member was present.

Additionally, the room we were given was completely different from what was shown during the booking. Overall, very poor service and unacceptable staff behavior. Would not recommend this place.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Ca. 50 Schritte zum Strand. Grosszügige und komfortable Betten und grosszügiges Badezimmer. Sehr zentral. Sehr gute Einkaufsmöglichkeiten (King Kong Mart). Gutes "Reisebüro" für Touren (John`s Tours). Gute Busverbindungen (gratis). Ein Besuch in der Ngoc Hien Pearl (Schmuckfabrik), Sunset Town (Städtchen im italienischen Stil), Zoo (Vin World Safari), Fischsaucenfabrik und Weinkellerei ist empfehlenswert. Sauberer aber gut besuchter Strand. Sehr gut erhaltene Infrastruktur (Strassen und ÖV)
sample_comments.negatives: Nur während ca. 6 Monate optimal zum bereisen (Trockenzeit). Die restlichen Monate fallen in die Regenzeit. Die Unterkunftsbetreuung lässt zu wünschen übrig (fehlende Arbeitsmoral). Kein Verleih von Roller und Velo. Die Preise für Kost sind doppelt so hoch wie auf dem Festland (Insel und Saison). Viele unangenehme Touristen! - Werte Besucher aus Russland, England und Deutschland; Bitte versucht Respekt aufzubringen und sehnt euch nicht immer und überall nach "Ballermann"! Danke! - Hier seid ihr Fremde! Allgemeine Vorsicht ist in belebter Umgebung geboten. Der Phu Quoc Night Market war für mich nichts Besonderes ... - Gute und preiswerte Kost gibt`s gleich eine Gasse neben dem Areal ...

sample_comments.negatives: Das Wasser ist eine Katastrophe am gesamten Longbeach, in Europa wäre Baden dort verboten und es stünden überall Warnschilder mit Totenköpfen.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Die Bungalows sind sehr großzügig geschnitten und unfassbar nah zum Strand. In bereits 5 Minuten Fußweg ist man auf der Hauptstraße und findet alles zu essen.

sample_comments.title: Rude staff
sample_comments.text:
Steer clear of this place. Nothing like the pictures and the staff are rude as f*. There was a big family staying next door who also had a room upstairs. Their children were screaming and running around slamming doors behind them. We got little sleep and was woken up at 6:30 to slamming doors and children screaming. When complained and asked for another room, the receptionist was initially accommodating over the phone and said they had another room for us so we packed everything to move. Her attitude changed when we turned up at reception and the same big butch lady over the phone with an angry nasty look on her face told us there were no other rooms and I felt intimated to put up and shut up. We were staying in room A105.

Lounge chairs are broken, beach is dirty, the place is half building site. They need better staff training and perhaps not let that lady near guests.

sample_comments.negatives: De rommelige accommodatie. Het was er slordig.

So dissapointed!

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.positives: Фотографии не соответствуют действительности. Описание тоже. Отель практически полностью разрушен, лишь несколько домиков пригодны для жилья. Ресторан разрушен , персонал ленивый , будет два дня переступать через мусор, но не поднимет ! От пляжных зонтиков не осталось и следа, хотя на фото они есть. Основная задача персонала, это продать шезлонги и пиво гостям не проживающим в этом отеле. Что делает из него проходной двор. Единственный плюс, это местоположение!!! Вы живёте на берегу моря!

sample_comments.title: STay Away from this Hotel. Awfal service. Rude Staff
sample_comments.text: Very unprofessional. Staff are unfriendly and didnt know what they are doing. We found many dark flies in our room and the bed contained many bed bugs. My girlfriend was cratching her body the whole night and couldnt sleep. We called the staff during the middle of the night to complain about the situation but couldnt get a hold for almost 2 hours. They changed our room but there were new problems such as toilet clogged and only hot water. We asked for a pair of slipped and one of the staff yelled at us for no reason. At the time of the checkout, we asked to speak to the manager but they said that he/she is on business abroad and couldnt solve the problem. All they said was sorry. I would not recommended this hotel to anyone. Please stay away from this hotel as the staff are very unprofessional and rude. Also the rooms have too many bed bugs and flies.

sample_comments.title: SHOULD NOT BE HERE
sample_comments.text: The hotel has a beach, but all hotels there share this beach, so you can choose hotels nearby. The amenities at Arcadia hotel are only average, the room uses yellow light only and there is no white light, so it is very dim for makeup, and the fans haven't been cleaned for a long time and are covered in dust. The toilet has a musty smell, and both the floor and walls are deteriorating. The staff, particularly one receptionist and the housekeeping staff, made me really uncomfortable because they cleaned the room without asking the guests first. I felt uneasy and was afraid of losing my belongings. On the last day of my stay, before check-out time, they took my things out to the reception without asking or notifying me, and when I returned to the hotel, they stopped me and said that my room had been cleaned and my belongings were now with them. They reasoned that they needed to prepare for the next guest, so they decided to move my things without consulting me. The hotel also rents motorbikes; when I asked how much for one night, today they said 100,000 VND per night, and tomorrow another staff member said it was 150,000 VND per night. On the day I checked in, which was the 30th, I borrowed a bike to buy some late-night food; I only used the bike for half a day. I didn't use it on the second day because I went on a 4-island tour. I only started using it on the third day, which was also the day I returned the bike. On the final day when I returned the bike, they quoted me a total of 450,000 VND for the three days I was there. When I borrowed the bike, I asked how the pricing worked since it was one night. The receptionist said if I rented it at 11 PM on the 30th, it would only be counted as one day until 11 PM on the 31st. When I returned the bike at 7 PM on the 1st, the hotel still charged me for three days which were the 30th, 31st, and 1st for 450,000 VND. The bike was a automatic scooter but was damaged and hard to ride; when I received the bike, it had no gas. I filled it up on the night of the 30th, and the insurance was also broken. I overlooked everything because I thought it would just be temporary, but when it came to payment, I couldn't accept it, so I left this review here for everyone to understand and not make the same mistake as I did.

sample_comments.title: DO NOT STAY HERE!!!

But no cleaning products, then used the bidet hose to spray all over and around the toilet, again no cleaning products. In the meantime, we found several stains on the bed linen, including the doona cover, and the pillows, and a few other minor issues so it was the last straw. We decided we did not want to stay, and checked out. No problem withthe staff members at reception. They were very accommodating, and refunded us for two of our three nights stay. The address for the property is also incorrect which we will inform booking.com about. The location was also not good. Whilst being beachfront attracted us, access from main street was a nightmare. One narrow lane that one single car can barely negotiate, and a lot of fun if another car is head on tryin to come through!! good luck!! The only way this would be an ideal location is if you had a motorbike, and could get in and out relatively easy. A bit of a walk too. The balcony furniture was like WHAT THE!!! Why anyone would have furniture in that condition still on the deck is beyond me. Should be on a fire heap to be burnt. The little restaurant on site may have been good, but with what we were experiencing, we would not risk it - we were done, and just wanted to get out of there. However, we could not speak more highly of the staff at reception. Especially a lovely young man who bent over backwards to help us in every way. sample_comments.title: Comfortable bed, but the resort is badly run and very outdated
sample_comments.text:
Pros:
The bed was surprisingly comfortable and the pillow was good, which helped us sleep well.

Cons:
Unfortunately, almost everything else was disappointing. The entire resort feels very outdated, and it looks like no meaningful investments or renovations have been made since it originally opened.

When booking, there is no option to choose between a king-size bed or twin beds, so we ended up with two separate beds instead of one, which was not ideal for us.

The staff speaks very little English, and most signs and information are in Russian or Vietnamese. Communication was difficult, and the staff generally seemed uninterested in guests --- it felt like nobody really cared that you were staying there.

Cleanliness is a major issue. When we arrived, the lobby was dirty and not cleaned at all: trash was left on tables, spoons were on the floor, and the whole area looked messy and neglected. In our room, there was a used cotton swab left next to the toilet, clearly not cleaned by housekeeping. The walls were dirty, stained, and cracked.

In the morning, when we went to the beach bar to ask for towels, it was obvious that the previous night's party had not been cleaned up at all. Empty bottles were everywhere, and behind the bar there were piles of dirty dishes. The beach itself was also quite dirty, with trash scattered around.

Overall, the resort has potential, but the poor maintenance, lack of cleanliness, and indifferent service make it hard to recommend.

sample_comments.title: STAFF ARE AWARE OF BED BUGS AND STILL SELL ROOMS?!
sample_comments.text:
On our 4th night we realized we had not seen a single mosquito, and yet kept waking up with more and more bites every day. A quick google search with images of bed bug bites confirmed my suspicion. I explained this to a receptionist and she just looked at me awkwardly.I politely explained that there is no chance of us sleeping in that same room tonight.She told me to pack up and my belongings to be moved to another room. I confirmed if it will be a bungalow as well as we were given a hard upsell on arrival once I handed over my passport, and paid 1 million VND more for this upgrade. She confirmed it would be a bungalow also. So not long after we were moved into a smaller bungalow, left to go outside, then returned and saw that our old bed bug ridden bungalow was now occupied with new guests! Having then slept rough from probably the paranoia me and my wife then woke up with more bed bug bites and that was the last straw for us. How can they continue to do business like this? There were young toddlers staying at the resort. I will be interested to see if Agora take any more bookings for them.

By the way 2 out 3 available sockets in both rooms were faulty, and you have to find and pull out your own chair at breakfast time. Stray dogs linger and They while you are eating breakfast and you are harassed by sellers on the beach. Our honeymoon and memory of vietnam would have been ruined if we had not booked a better resort to stay at.

It is cheap for a reason, and should not be allowed to continue.

The only thing saved the trip is its view and location is right next to the beach, other than that there is nothig around. sample_comments.title: Budget Stay Near Beach with Several Drawbacks
sample_comments.text:
If you're looking for a budget-friendly stay near the beach, this property is acceptable. However, our overall experience was disappointing.

The biggest drawback was the food. There were no proper vegetarian options for breakfast, and the buffet was extremely limited. For three consecutive days, we were served the same basic vegetarian fried rice, which became repetitive and underwhelming.

The resort itself appears poorly maintained and worn out. Several areas look damaged and shabby, which affects the overall comfort and experience.

Our main disappointment was how a minor issue was handled. Our child accidentally got some wax color on the bedsheet --- something quite common with kids. The hotel initially charged us 20 lakh VND, which felt excessive. We had to go to the reception with detergent and water and physically demonstrate that the stain was washable. While the staff eventually acknowledged this, the entire situation was unnecessarily embarrassing and poorly handled, especially for a family with a young child.

Overall, while the location may work for budget travelers, the lack of maintenance, limited vegetarian food options, and the way issues are handled make it difficult to recommend this property.

sample_comments.title: There is no management at all.

sample_comments.title: I will try to be fair about this experience
sample_comments.text:
So as we know it, the tourism industry in the whole of Vietnam, Phu Quoc included, has been hit hard by Covid. So when the island managed to scramble its last resources to stay open for this one holiday season there were many issues that comes with it. I have been told by Arcadia's very lovely and helpful receptionist that the resort has one staff and that is her, doing both reception jobs and cleaning rooms at the same time. 
The resort itself is VERY RUN DOWN, there were dust and a weird funky smell when we checked into our room. The room, the towels, the sheets stinks, and furniture is very old. My booking stated breakfast included but their restaurant has been closed for months and like I mentioned above there is one staff running the whole place, so no breakfast for anyone.
My thoughts are: if you plan to open the resort for only one season, update your profile on Agoda to say no breakfast included + at least do some decent cleaning or maintenance and painting jobs + lower prices to at least 20% of what you were charging us. OR STAY CLOSED until you have the funding to rebuild the place. 

I only stayed here 2 nights as my Phu Quoc hotel was booked out so Arcadia was my last resort resort. I recommend other travellers to really consider other places before booking this place, unless you carry around your own tent and you like pitching your tent on their private beach. 
All in all, 1 star.

sample_comments.title: I very rarely write negative reviews
sample_comments.text:
Got upgraded on arrival! Great! Wish I hadn't (I will explain later)
Room was large, clean, big tv, shower cubicle. Step were marble (or similar), its wet season, it rains, it becomes like ice. I was inching down when in an instant I was in a heap at the bottom! Still intact although battered and bruised. Different story had I been my parents age!
Shower had intermittent problem. Hotter that hell one minute, difficult to adjust, then as always, just as you get soaped up, cold and weak and nothing you can do. Happened 3 times, I asked reception to take a look, the non English speaking maintenance guy (which I fully understand and accept doesn't speak English so should have been accompanied by receptionist that could) just laughed as it worked fine when he tried it, and left. Try explaining the word intermittent to someone that didn't understand the word cold!
It happened again. I was offered another room, but they 'only have the basic room available' which was surprising as we barely saw other guests the whole time we were there! Checked the shower in the other room, the receptionist told me it was hot, it was tepid at best.
Went for lunch first day, SUPERB! Clay hot pot, prawns, fried rice. Happy days. Ate there 3 times afterwards, the same dishes didn't even resemble each other. Different tastes, ingredients etc. each time we left unsatisfied for the price it was poor. Again I understand different chefs cook in different ways but surely the menu should have at least a basic spec and standard they work towards. 
Got back from bfast to find 3 workmen in our room and 2 cleaners sat on the windowsill. Wasn't asked or informed. 
Booked taxi early to airport via reception. Taxi for 6am. No one there so I could check out or return my passports. Waited half an hour. Livid! Run out of characters in this review. Shame, I had only just started! This is my first negative review in nearly 5 months of travel, most rooms costing a fraction of this price! In a word.... Shamb

sample_comments.positives: Room was clean and comfortable,beach was nice,breakfast was ok

sample_comments.title: Not a real 3*hotel
sample_comments.text: We spent 9 nights in this hotel and managed to change the room to the building B on the second night (first night stayed in a muddy, small, with no terrace double room for 50 USD in building A). Villas look nice but are too expensive. Best thing about breakfast was the omelette but they really need to work on the menu for the rest of the meals, which are not included on the and are totally overpriced. Staff was nice but they need to go through some training. Beautiful sunset on the beach, but you'll have to wake up early if you want to get a lounge chair, because they are always "occupied" with towels and books but no people most of he day. It's a shame that with such a good location they dont get to the expectations of their customers.

sample_comments.title: Nice & Quiet
sample_comments.text: Our stay was nice, the staff was friendly. The bungalow we had was ocean view, really nice and big. It could much more nicer though, it is not well maintained, it was clean but could be cleaner. WIFI did not work properly. The surrounding is nice, but here again, could be more maintained and taking care of. During 3 days, the trash can on the beach were not emptied. The breakfast was really poor and the Christmas Dinner Gala we had to take (no choice) was way to expensive for what we did get, cold food and warm drinks... (was worth max. $20, we paid $90 per person excl. drinks??). We had to wake up early in order to get any available chairs on the beach. Also for the price, I think it would be a nice touch if you get pick up/drop off from/to hotel-airport, we have been a few times to Phu Quoc and it is the first resort that they don't offer the service.

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel, not close to the center
sample_comments.text:
hotel located down a small road and is on the beach. room was ok but it had big window so had to keep curtains closed while in the room as otherwise everyone could see in. this resulted in not being to see out while in the room. room good size. breakfast does not have a lot of choices, a fry or egg omelette and a bread roll.

motorbike hire available form hotel. 

i having a mistake with booking additional nights and they charged me twice and would not change would not change their minds. for this reason i will not return again
sample_comments.positives: on the beach not too big

sample_comments.title: This hotel could be great... in a few years.
sample_comments.text: This Hotel looked good at first though I have to say it is too new to be worth the price range. There were many small and unusual qualities lacking that added up to a generally poor experience. From taking our balcony furniture unannounced to accommodate the restaurant, to no hot water and generally obtuse service. My girlfriend and I moved to another hotel as a result. I think it may be a reflection on the creases and inexperience of just opening and presume it will take a few years before they figure it out.

sample_comments.title: Arcadina is quite bad.
sample_comments.text:
- I was at Arcadina about 2 years ago and everything was very good. But this return experience was really bad!!! 
- When we arrived, we had to wait without anyone welcoming us or arranging our room. At one point, I had to go down to the lodging area to find staff there.
- At night, around 10:30 PM, when we returned from dinner, we asked a staff member to unlock our jammed room, but we had to call several times and received an annoyed attitude because the staff was sleepy.
- The room I stayed in near the beach had a wooden floor that was deteriorating and broken. Next to the room, there was a pile of old belongings that had not been cleaned up.
- The scenery of the resort when I arrived was quite gloomy, with old houses that had not been painted or repaired for a long time. The garden and vegetation were also not well-maintained.
- These are sincere suggestions; I will still return to support.

sample_comments.title: Cheap but that's it
sample_comments.text: Very rundown, staff doesn't speak a word in English and got a room with a broken AC. They upgraded me the next day and I appreciated that. Close to the sea.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text:
Near to beach though if you love spending time lazing at one

The facilities and villas are run down and lack of maintenance 
No fridge and aircon not cold enough 
Need to walk out for food 

Nearby pubs

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: It's the opening of the island after the pandemic so the hotel was kinda unclean and some of the facilities were stocked and crappy. But it's very close to the beach and it's an advantage.

sample_comments.title: Very old facilities
sample_comments.text: The staff is friendly however the place has not been updated for at least 20 years. It s very very dirty. And with that price it s not cheap. I have to leave the room (paid) and go for other options. I see only backpackers stay there. Not suitable for family.

sample_comments.title: scary at night
sample_comments.text: the room is okay but some stuff is broken and they're don't fix it

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: Dirty private beach, tasteless breakfast but helpful staffs

sample_comments.title: Return customer
sample_comments.text: Visited 7 years ago but very suprised by how tired the hotel looks. Location stunning for Phu Quoc but accommodation a let down. Chose a bungalow with sea view. Poor lighting, poor maintenance, rotting decking in parts, floor lifting in room, poor beach cleaning for a private beach and poor wifi. As for the breakfast....don't bother....go next door or up the road. On my last visit they made up for any shortfalls with charm and a 'can do ' approach.......not now.....just thankful for the stunning location....

sample_comments.title: Not sastified
sample_comments.text:
1. Housekeeping staff knocked on the door twice when we were in the room to ask whether we need cleaning service even though I told them please do it when we went out. When we opened the door they still stood in front of the door. Surprised?!
2. Wall with blisters
3. As mentioned, the room is with a King bed but actually it seems a Queen bad only
4. Shower cap was not changed on 2nd day
5. Some staffs are nice but overall it is not worth for money

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: This resort has a nice private beach and in a central location. However, the resort is located in a small alley, which is 3-5 min walk to the main road. It is dark at night to walk. Facilities definitely can be improved. We had to ask for fixes in our room a few times. They did try to work on it immediately but then it took a few fixes to get the work done. The bathroom design is not very ideal with large empty space (appearing to be a bathtub before) and small shower corner. Of course you would expect mosquito around.

sample_comments.title: Outdated with no Manager to solve your problems
sample_comments.text: Outdated hotel. Our booked bungalows where not available first night and we where offered to stay at the different hotel 1km away. Same happened to other guests of Arcadia. No manager on duty ever during our 2 weeks stay.

sample_comments.title: Very unfriendly staff
sample_comments.text:
Positive: The location is nice, especially the beachfront-bungalows. The beach is also nice.

Negative: The staff is extremely unfriendly. During the breakfast there are dogs in the area chasing around. Instead of making them go away, the staff gave them food in front of is (leftovers from other guests). There were ants in the room. 

After two days we left and went to another hotel (Cassia Cottage), which is so much nicer and the staff values their guests.

sample_comments.title: Not worth it.
sample_comments.text: No this review is for the basic room. There were other rooms, "garden view" I think and above that seemed nicer, but considering there are warning against swimming, it wasn't worth staying on the beach. There are plenty of smaller, cheaper, newer hotels around that are just off the beach which are half the price or less. Overall the staff was friendly and the grounds were okay but not worth the extra cost.

sample_comments.title: Really so so...
sample_comments.text: Staff not professional, poor breakfast both in quantity and quality, lots of bugs, spiders and geckos in the room as there are many slots through windows and doors.

sample_comments.title: Not that Good
sample_comments.text: I would not recommend here or any hotels located near there!

sample_comments.title: Location is wonderful, but bath room is not clean.
sample_comments.text: Front staffs made them effort, but bad make staff move slowly and no smile.

sample_comments.title: ok, but nothing more than that.
sample_comments.text:
The room was not clean when we arrived, Wifi was not working so well.
Most of the staff cannot speak English at all, when we arrived we have been asked for the "wouter" (voucher), and the guy had to call someone on the phone that could speak English but we couldn't hear because of a lot of background noise, at breakfast the staff could not even understand the words bread/bun.
We booked a taxi from the hotel for a fixed price, but when arriving we ended up having to pay the metered price which was higher.

The only good things about this place is that the room was very big and with a beach front bungalow we could see the beach from our bed when opening the curtains.
The aircon in the room is too small, so even after it has been on for the entire night the room is only ok and not cold, and they only give you one keycard so when you leave the room the aircon is turned off.

sample_comments.title: No pool
sample_comments.text: No pool, no gym, fake images on Agoda

sample_comments.title: 3 nights at Phu Quoc
sample_comments.text:
The location was great and the beach was lovely. It was disappointing to see what could be a really nice resort run down and not maintained. We really could not complain but it is not even worthy of 3 stars.
I would go back without a problem but the poor standard of food and facility's was just sad as it looks like it was really nice some years back

sample_comments.title: Still good though
sample_comments.text: 2 days in deluxe room only costed me 80usd. How nice. However, we had to upgrade to bungalow as the room was old and smell. The bungalow garden view was 45usd/day. still good though. Be prepared insect and mosquito. Customer service is poor. well, u get what u pay for.

sample_comments.title: Pricey for the holidays, but nice resort.
sample_comments.text: The property and bungalows of Arcadia Phu Quoc Resort is underrated, more like a 3.4-4 star. Location is good. We were there for Christmas which meant overpriced. Food is fundamentally bad. Beach is fantastic.

sample_comments.title: Enjoy beach and food with family and child
sample_comments.text: We travelled with family and child in 3 days. The beach is in front of hotel and quiet enough. The staff and manager are very nice. The room and restroom are clean. The food is quite boring while other restaurants in Phu Quoc are very delicious. The hotel is good price for money to explore Phu Quoc and enjoy the beach.
sample_comments.positives: Nice staff, nice beach, Good price

sample_comments.title: Large bungalow with sea view
sample_comments.text: The best thing about the resort is that it's situated right on the beach. Very private and quiet which is great for couples. Very relaxing when chilling out on the beach. You'd be the only one there. But that's about it. The receptionist couldn't speak English well and our checking in process was a bit slow but she was relatively nice. The breakfast, to be honest, was not good and not tasty. It's better to go out and head elsewhere for a decent if not fantastic breakfast.
sample_comments.positives: Close to beach. Huge bungalow room view of the sea. Quite and private.

sample_comments.title: Average hotel but very good location
sample_comments.text:
The cons:

The standard room we booked was facing an ugly concrete tower containing a water reservoir and really noisy pump which was active night and day. 

FrThe shower drain exhaled a permanent stench of excrement on the whole room night and day. We tried to cover it with a towel which didn't really help. 
Another very big con was the noise coming from some sort of pump in the ceiling above. Thus we had to wear earplugs every night. 

The Wifi was very weak and almost in existent indoors. 

The breakfast was quite good but the coffee was only filter coffee, cheese and sausage had no taste at all. 

We also didn't like the atmosphere of the resort. It was too faceless, without any charm in our view. They used good materials and it was all together clean, but we didn't feel comfortable. 

You can find various other resorts for a better price around. If you don't mind to walk 200 meters to the beach, you can even find very nice ones, without frills, clean and light for twenty five dollars in high season.
sample_comments.positives: Clean rooms, good location, beautiful beach

sample_comments.title: It worths for the discount pricep
sample_comments.text: My family stayed here for 3 nights, it was 50% discount for agoda price. The standard room is so so, the superior room is almost the same with the same facilities but the room area is a little bit bigger. The most beautiful is the beach, amazing for sunbath and sunset watching. Staff is very nice and helpful. Breakfast for 3 days almost the same with a little choice. Location isn't really convenient, approximately 3 kms from the downtown, rent a 24 hour motorbike for ease in transportation to the must see spots and food.

sample_comments.title: nice resort, busy in constructionwork
sample_comments.text:
Manager and waiters in restaurant were continuously trying to sell snorkelingtrips and rent motorbikes, this was quite annoying. The reception could arrange these kind of things, its not pleasant to be bothered by personnel about these things.
Due to all the constructionwork laying on the beach was not really relaxing, the were sanding the floors whole day long.
Most staffmembers speak very poor english (as almost everyone in Vietnam).

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: Cleanliness wise Arcadia can do a better job, the man at the reception was hardly there, we had to wait for long or go in search of him inside the resort. Mosquitoes were a menace here, keeping the rooms and surroundings clean will avoid Mosquitoes to an extent

sample_comments.title: Good for beach site stya
sample_comments.text: Good for family

sample_comments.title: A few problems.
sample_comments.text: First of all, let's talk about the advantages: the location is very good. Also, the scale is quite large, more than I expected. It is next to the beach and right next to Zenbar and Oxenbar, so you can enjoy the nightlife as well. However, when I went, the Wi-Fi was completely non-functional, and there was barely any hot water. When I inquired about the Wi-Fi, they said it was under repair and would take about two hours, but it was never fixed until the moment I checked out. The facilities are a bit outdated. There are parts that haven't been properly repaired where broken wood is present. Also, the garden is really spacious, but there are few staff members, so it doesn't feel well-maintained. However, I recommend it for those who want to enjoy the sea as if it's their own at a low price.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: The resort itself is not quite in good condition, restaurant was shut and staff was kinda cute but not so professional.

sample_comments.title: an abandoned resort
sample_comments.text: this resort really well located view and beach are nice but definetly need some maintenance and gardening...

sample_comments.title: Good location but needs some work.
sample_comments.text: The resort is in a beautiful location and we really enjoyed being able to lie on the resort's beach chairs. The bed was very comfortable however the room we got did not look like the pictures of the one we booked. Windows and doors didn't fully close, the drain was broken, shower pressure wasn't great and sometimes had to wait a long time for hot water. In general we felt everything was a bit shabby and the room we stayed in wasn't good value for money. We also felt the staff were not particularly friendly or helpful at times.

sample_comments.title: I was so nervous
sample_comments.text: The price is reasonable. I was there for a night, and I guessed the electricity was out due to heavy rain. However, when I called receptionist 5-6 times to ask why the electricity was out, nobody picked up the phone. I was terrified and I couldn't sleep. I had to call the receptionist of the near by hotel to ask whether the electricity of the whole area was out or what. Until the Brenta hotel( near by) receptionist confirmed with me that the electricity was out due to the rain, I felt like the rock finally fell of my chest. It was a horrible experience for me. I'm definitely not going to stay in this type of hotel alone in the moon soon season again.

sample_comments.title: Acadia resort Phu Quoc 5 nights June 2019
sample_comments.text: Customer service & property maintenance fell short of expectations to put it mildly. In fact, it's the worst we had experienced in our 3 months vacation around Vietnam & others. Even our prior 4 nights stay in Phu Quoc was very much better. Just to name a few issues with Acadia during our stay. TV was like snow screen. Called front desk twice in different times still no one comes. Third time and was told perhaps weather conditions. When I insisted someone must come then finally happened and it was the clear sign of defective cable. House keeping also not clean. Room phone sporadic. When our last night stay we need to leave early just before breakfast, they wouldn't do any extra out of their way to provide. In spit of having a premium ocean view room, rattle sounds in night due to wind. However location is pretty good & beach front. Breakfast is good & dining staffs are better.

sample_comments.title: The ocean hể in this area (Tran Hung Dao road) has lots of jellyfish
sample_comments.text: We cant swim here cuz there are lots of jellyfish, we live in beachfront bungalow but cant swim even a bit. Jellyfish will sting and that would be bad because they have toxic. Better stay in Intercontinental.

sample_comments.title: good hotel
sample_comments.text: good hotel

sample_comments.title: Medium quality hotel
sample_comments.text: Overall is good hotel if you stay in front beach bangalow good view of beach. Facilities need to maintain. Avearge service staff. Poor breakfast

sample_comments.title: Construction work noise, old fashion, nice beach
sample_comments.text: Would not go there again

sample_comments.title: Hotel is old. Breakfast unsatified.
sample_comments.text: I was a little disappoimted about the breakfast. Unorganized. If you come late, then the food is finesh and will not renew.

sample_comments.title: Get what you pay for?
sample_comments.text: Could have paid slightly more for better...lots of tour groups screaming from one end of resort to the other and this was at 6am onwards. Basic room to be expected...just a shame no staff interaction very little English speaking staff which I don't usually mind as long as a little effort is made, staff in restaurant very young and more interested in chasing each other about the place. Breakfast terrible ..other food so so

sample_comments.title: average hotel
sample_comments.text: The room was small, with old air-con and old television.

sample_comments.title: Tucked away in a good way
sample_comments.text: The resort is tucked away from a busy street so that was a plus. The sunsets were amazing here as well. However, during the day, we spent the time away from the resort as the food and beach were definitely better elsewhere. If you know how to ride a motorcycle, there's no need to pay the money to stay at this resort unless you choose a beachfront bungalow with a patio. We booked a garden view having many experiences in our myriad travels in Asia with rooms not being that much different other than the view, but this one, the change was drastic. We were unhappy with our tiny room while big ones lay available; usually resorts also offer the upgrade but this one didn't, and to be fair, I didn't bother to ask. Staff was kind despite their weak English skills; it seemed that they were just learning the business.
sample_comments.positives: Quietness, Sunset and easy motorcycle rental arrangement

sample_comments.title: Beautiful beach
sample_comments.text: Good location, beautiful beach and for sure that who love bathe will like this beach. you can go to Duong Dong night market easily. The breakfast is not good at all. The staff is not professional but some of them are very kind. Anyway, we will choose Arcadia for next trip to Phu Quoc.
sample_comments.positives: beautiful beach, good location, good view for bungalow seaview

sample_comments.title: A modest stay.
sample_comments.text: A modest stay.
sample_comments.positives: Sea view, quietness and friendly staff.

sample_comments.title: good for money but bad for locations
sample_comments.text:
The customer services are good.

As I told, the location is not good, it is far from the center and it takes around 5 minutes from the main road to　reach the hotel location.
Further more, I paid additional vnd 500000 (around $20) and asked the customer service officer to change my room to a new room with the beach view. Otherwise, I do not think it was worth if staying in a room far from the ocean (very hot in summer)

The air condition is not good as well. The room is small.

sample_comments.title: Nice Hotel. Nice Bungalows. Food moderate.
sample_comments.text: Nice stay. Nice bungalows. You have to save your place at the beach early in the morning, becaus of the German and Russian habits. You have to ask for the beach towels. Breakfast moderate and ne refill. However, a lot of nice and cheap restaurants around. Friendly Staff.

sample_comments.title: Good time for leisures with family and child
sample_comments.text: We travelled with family and child in 3 days. The beach is in front of hotel and quiet enough. The staff and manager are very nice. The room and restroom are clean. The food is quite boring while other restaurants in Phu Quoc are very delicious. The hotel is good price for money to explore Phu Quoc and enjoy the beach.
sample_comments.positives: Nice staff, nice beach, Good price

sample_comments.title: so-so hotel
sample_comments.text:
Wifi is not readily available on first day - reason, because we are foreigners and need prior registration with police !!??
Lack of varieties for breakfast
sample_comments.positives: by the beach, close to town, close to variety of restaurants

sample_comments.title: Nice beach
sample_comments.text:
We stayed for 2 nights at ocean front bungalow, the room was big, with large window, bed is comfortable, big bathroom but it's need a lot of upgrade. The breakfast has limited choice but people that serve the breakfast was friendly, they try very best to get everyone well feed. 
Overall, we enjoy the stay. For that price under 100.00 for Ocean front room, there is no complain.

sample_comments.title: A little bit disappointed.
sample_comments.text:
This hotel is far from center (diner place such as night seafood market 'Dinh Cậu" and airport for driver who travle by motorbike but it is a great experience. 
About the Arcadia Phu Quoc Resort: their room are suitable with all door by glass so you can see the view anywhere, anytime ( beach, sun rise...) 
However, the behaviour of waiters in resort's restaurant may make the guess angry because of wait for a long time. We other the food with Frence fries and coke and we wait for 30 min while their cookers are chatting with annother.

sample_comments.title: OK location but disappointed surroundings
sample_comments.text: There are some comments for improvements as well. The hotel is covered by residental area and at a result, waste and dirty water flow directly to the sea. The hotel garden is not carefully kept.
sample_comments.positives: The best of the hotel is the off-season price. The price was ok for a double bedroom and the room is clean and tidy. The hotel locates near the end of Long Beach and in the same alley with La Veranda. Rent a moped and you can go anywhere you like.

sample_comments.title: great location new but still need to workout kinks
sample_comments.text:
hotel is newly built on popular strand of beach. however, since it is rather new, some services like food (i.e. good) is limited. give this hotel another year to workout kinks. there are plenty of dining and night life options nearby. make sure you rent a scooter!

the island itself only has two developed beach areas, which is good because the nw part of island is sparsely inhabited with pristine beaches.

sample_comments.title: Apparently new hotel but so much work to do!!!
sample_comments.text:
I stayed in an upstairs room with sea view but it really was not that special and definitely overpriced for what it was. The windows and doors didn't quite fit in, I had problems with the air-con as the remote control was in Japanese! One evening I asked for help with the air-con but the maintenance guy didn't seem interested at all. The next morning another guy was very nice and helpful though. Reception staff and restaurant staff were nice but they still need to improve their service skills a lot. 
There were not enough sun bed cushions and the towels they provided were as if they were leftovers from a kindergarten. The beach was very nice and clean though.
One day I had food poisoning after breakfast but not sure what exactly caused it. All the food is lying in the open though and flies etc. have very good access to it. The fried breakfast they do on the spot is very good though.
Ultimately I've got to say though that I wouldn't go back there, unless they offered the rooms much cheaper, as for that money you should be able to find better options.

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text: Good enough but breakfast at 07.30 am starting time is too late

sample_comments.title: 6.5, view is OK but service is not that good
sample_comments.text: I was in a deluxe garden view room with wife and kid, my friends stayed in the same type of room. Generally, the resort might be worth its money, the beach view is nice, location is quite decent and the decoration is quite beautiful. However the room itself is not that good as expected, room is quite small, facility is acceptable, staff is friendly.

sample_comments.title: Great location but needs attention
sample_comments.text:
We enjoyed our stay, but the rooms do smell quite mouldy and the food was really terrible as previous reviews suggested, at breakfast we were served stale bread, most of the items run out & they don't replace it, dinner was expensive & not worth it.

Rooms look nice & are quite comfortable to stay in, the resort itself is very pretty and the location is fantastic. The staff at reception was of great help & very friendly. Needs a bit of attention, but still one of the nicest places to stay on the island currently.
sample_comments.positives: Vicinity on island, island resort feel, fresh water showers

sample_comments.title: Great setting
sample_comments.text:
good, but very poor plumbing, bad smells coming up the drains, 
Rooms nice but not particularly clean.
Breakfast ok, forget eating there any other time. Staff not very friendly
sample_comments.positives: nice beachfront room, beautiful setting, plenty of space on the beach

sample_comments.title: Nice views only if you get a good unit
sample_comments.text:
Although I was book on ocean views unit, when I initially checked in, the unit was not facing ocean view. It was facing another unit. This was really disappointing. The unit was small but clean. After some complains and checking, the staffs agreed to let us upgrade to bungalow units with top ups. 
The bungalow units was ok. It was leaking a little when the weather was bad.
sample_comments.positives: on the beach, quite close to town,

sample_comments.title: The hotel is fairly good
sample_comments.text: The hotel is quite nice, quite place, close to the ocean. The food is good and the staff is friendly. However, no swimming pool inside, just enjoy the sun and the beach.
sample_comments.positives: close to the ocean, nice breakfast, friendly staff

sample_comments.title: The hotel is OK, but rather expenstive
sample_comments.text: Hotel is OK, but the staff is not helpful. When we arrived, they did not come to our car to pick up the luggage. Breakfast is poor and the restaurant is extremely expensive

sample_comments.title: Decent option, on the beach
sample_comments.text: Not a bad option, though probably a little over-priced compared to other hotels in the area. A nice spot to hide out for a few days.Breakfast not of the highest quality.
sample_comments.positives: Staff very helpful and friendly,spacious room

sample_comments.title: New Hotel and staff are on a steep learning curve
sample_comments.text:
having stayed at koh samui a few times we thought phu quoc (also in the gulf of thailand) would be a great place to try. we booked a garden view bungalow but received an ocean view bungalow due to over-booking much to our delight. 
nice big room, clean with decent bathroom etc for a 3+ star hotel. communication with some of the operational staff is a little challenging but no problems. counter staff are pretty good. we had many swims in the sea approx 50 metres from our door. nice and warm but slack tide once again exposed the vietnamese habit of disposing of all manners of rubbish in the sea detracting what would've been a good overall experience. 
evening dinner was a bbq of various types of seafood, cooked ok, not dressed up, absolutely no sides at all and was fairly expensive. no menu was available. we hired a scooter and tripped around. not all that much to see but a few more years will see a lot of tourist development. we'll go back sometime if travellers reviews report positive comments on vietnam taking care of their environment. they could learn a lot from cambodia in this respect. this is a culture thing and i don't point at this hotel for that.
sample_comments.positives: Very quiet and very close to beach

sample_comments.title: Nice location & good value
sample_comments.text: nice quiet location and excellent white sand beach. the rooms are nothing special and the bathroom was truly strange (there was no drain in the shower so the bathroom floor was constantly wet, don't even think about using an electrical appliance in there!). breakfast wasn't bad although the selection was somewhat limited (only watermelon juice, nothing else). staff was a bit out of it but no more then you so often seen in se asia resorts. all in all good value for the price; the same thing on co samui would have cost twice as much.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful Hotel
sample_comments.text: It is beautiful, the view. However facility wise, it's quite old. The beach is right in front of your cabin, which is amazing. But the toilet isn't maintained very well and the sewage waste is let into the beach about 100m away from the beach you would swim in, so there's always a slight scent of waste. Moreover, the cabins are very spacious, but they are quite old. The main door does its job and keeps the cabin locked, but a few pushes might break it open.

sample_comments.title: Good for chilling
sample_comments.text:
This property is situated at beach side we can easily excess beach. Room has no phone for calling staff but it is pretty good for stay .
This is situated centre of the phu quoc. Easily excess for restaurant, cafe, super market,etc.

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text: Just OK

sample_comments.title: Could be amazing
sample_comments.text: We were there over Christmas and had our first two nights in a sea view room which was large and had stunning sea views. We used the sunbeds most days under the shade of the trees. The room was fine but the large veranda doors were in a poor state with big gaps. We spent the second three nights in what could be described as an almost derelict building. The windows were rotten and the glass had slipped leaving a big gap. One of the windows when closed also had a big gap which we stuffed both with towels to stop the moscitoes getting in. I could see that they are very slowly updating the rooms. The resort seems to lack any kind of management. It could be fantastic with a little effort. We are not fussy but the standard of the second building we stayed in was appalling in comparison to everywhere else we have stayed on the island.

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text:
房间很大，但是厕所不是很干净
位置不是特别好找，建议白天入住，晚上找比较复杂。

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text: The room is quite "old", the door & the lock is not good enough. No breakfast

The hotel is about 10mins from central market by taxi, where you can find good restaurant and walk along night market. We had no issue with staffs nor breakfast serving like others did, probably because we are local. What disappointed us was the access to hotel which was in narrow alleys with coffee shops and restaurants nearby. There was no activities by the beach anyway.

sample_comments.title: Good mid-level stay
sample_comments.text: A short taxi ride from the airport and the main town, the entrance is down some windy alleys of cafes and restaurants; at the end is a simple but comfortable resort nestled at the end and located on a nice stretch of beachfront. Some areas of the resort are in need of upkeep though if you're prepared to accept a few flaws it's still a decent resort for the price. There's quite a few ants inside, though the bungalows and beds are otherwise clean and comfortable. The sea was relatively clean and you can see your feet even in the deep, though it's weather dependent. The sand was nice enough but can see plenty of coals from where they've obviously had beach bonfires. Tip to management: avoid bonfires or do it in a proper pit so it doesn't dirty the whole beach. 90% of the guests were non-Vietnamese when we stayed, it would make a lot of sense if they change the breakfast to meet more of the tastes of the guests. Stir-fried instant noodles and Coca-Cola were not very appealing for brekkie. Cereals, breads, fruits, beans, bacon would be better. At least there was the trusty omelette. Reception staff were friendly and helpful. The litmus test is would I return, yes. Though I'd also try other resorts but that's just to try something new.

sample_comments.title: I recommend it for those who are okay with a shabby accommodation.
sample_comments.text:
It is very shabby and poorly maintained, so it's messy, but you can get a large accommodation at a low price. I really considered staying an extra day just for the view. Sunlight comes through the large windows, and the sea is laid out before you. It's the most beautiful sea and the closest accommodation when lying on the sunbed.

It was fine during the day, but it was really creepy at night when I came back. The path to get in is scary, all the resort lights are off, and the bathroom door has a window, which was terrifying at night. But as soon as the sunlight came in, I thought, "Wow, what is this? It's so beautiful!" I wondered if I should extend my stay for another day, but I was really scared. "Oh my god, it's so beautiful, what should I do?" I was contemplating from 6 AM until checkout. 

In the end, I was alone and too much of a coward to do it. If you have no money and are more than two people, give it a try at the risk of being deceived. Still, dear host, please manage the accommodations a bit better.

sample_comments.title: Great hotel, relaxed island
sample_comments.text:
Well, first of all I would like to just let you know that all the reviews of this hotel is true. Every single one. I believe we experienced most of those things as well. It is a nice hotel, but at the same time there's a lot of flaws. Breakfast is limited and often out of everything if you arrive late. But when you arrive in time, it is really nice except for the juices which are very unclear so to speak.

We upgraded to a beach view room, very nice and large. Can't speak for the standard rooms but they seemed nice as well, even though they are quite small. About the food, we actually did not eat once in the restaurant due to the reviews here. There's a couple of restaurants just a few minutes away and most of them were great and very cheap! The closest one to the left is probably the best and cheapest one. 

In general, the hotel is super nice. Just need the staff to attend it a bit more to keep it fresh and clean. The staff seems to lack motivation to keep it clean and take care of the area, which is very unfortunate. If they start caring this hotel would be really really great!

Still would go back if I could.
sample_comments.positives: Big room, close to the beach, nice staff

sample_comments.title: Comfortable, relaxing and thoroughly enjoyable!
sample_comments.text:
Just what we were looking for! 
Only negative was poor quality over priced food in the restaurant. And one morning they had run out of breakfast by the time we got there... but they were terribly apologetic. 
But, the night market is a cheap scooter away and provided awesome food for the evening, so it was only lunchtime that we suffered a bit and we were just too lazy to go anywhere else. Other lunch venues are within walking distance.
This is our second visit to Phu Quoc and the restaurant in the other hotel was of the same quality... maybe it's an island thing!
sample_comments.positives: Great beach, good service, clean comfortable room

sample_comments.title: Very relaxing end to our trip in Vietnam
sample_comments.text: Our stay was great at the Arcadia. It was recommended to us by another couple travelling whom we mwt up with in Hanoi. We had no intention of going to Phu Quoc until they raved about the resort. Very glad we did as it was just the end of our trip that we needed. Relaxing, beach was clean and there were tours available if you felt the need to explore. Will definately recommend to others.
sample_comments.positives: Beach frontage, Only a $3 cab fare to the night markets where they cooked the best seafood, Helpful Staff

sample_comments.title: Decent hotel on nice stretch of beach
sample_comments.text: Second stay at this hotel. On a nice part of Phu Quoc near La Veranda. No pool, but the beach area is probably one of the nicest on the island. Service is slow, but the staff are really friendly, and they try their best. Beach front villa worth the extra cost.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful beach, amazing sunset
sample_comments.text:
This is a very nice resort, not too large. Good breakfast selection, rooms are on the small side unless you get a bungalow. There was no physical shower, but a shower head, so you shower in the middle of the small bathroom and everything gets wet.
But the beach is spectacular, and wide compared to other parts on the same stretch. The water is clear, and clear of rocks and seaweed (not everywhere on this stretch) and at night the friendly staff move the chairs and tables to the beach for specials on cocktails while you sit and watch the magnificent sunset. 
There are restaurants nearby, but you are about 2km from the town center in case you want to shop around.
There are no water sports here while some other places have kyaks for rental.

sample_comments.text: The hotel is located off the main road but is directly on the beach. It is situated just out of town but everything you would need is within walking distance. The ocean view bungalow was really pleasant and was great to wake up every morning greated with the beach, the view was spectacular. The hotel staff were very helpful and their english was very good at reception and at the bar. The rooms were well appointed (even included mosquito spray/plugin for the room).

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: I booked a twin room for two nights. First of all, the location is very good; it's convenient to go to the Jingang Supermarket and the Phu Quoc Night Market. However, the road leading to the hotel is a bit dark, which might scare some girls, but it's quite safe! Now about the hotel: it's relatively old, and when you first enter, there's a strong musty smell. The cleanliness is average; there are some oil stains on the quilt, which someone with obsessive cleanliness might not be able to accept. I have mixed feelings about this hotel; I love and hate it. Right outside is a beautiful sea view with a gentle sea breeze and only the sound of the wind and waves, which makes it feel comfortable. Overall, the hotel is average but benefits from its reasonable price and beautiful scenery.

sample_comments.title: Recommended for cost-effective accommodation.
sample_comments.text: The building is old, and the door frame is twisted, so mosquitoes keep coming in through the cracks. It seems there is no breakfast service since there is no restaurant. However, the fact that the beach is right in front of the accommodation offsets some of the other drawbacks. Another advantage is that King Kong Mart is nearby. You can take a bus to the airport and get off at the King Kong Mart stop, so I recommend it for those looking for value for money.
